scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @tensor-viz/viewer-core && npm run build --workspace @tensor-viz/viewer-demo && node tools/sync-demo-assets.mjs
scripts.docs: npm run docs:ts && npm run docs:py
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @tensor-viz/viewer-core && npm run test --workspace @tensor-viz/viewer-demo && PYTHONPATH=python/src python -m unittest discover -s python/tests -p 'test_*.py'
